name: Egg Salad and Green Bean Sandwiches
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chopped sweet onion (such as Vidalia, Walla Walla, or Maui)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan of boiling salted water, cook beans until just tender, about 3 minutes.
2. Drain beans and plunge into a bowl of ice and cold water to stop cooking.
3. Remove beans from water and pat dry with paper towels.
4. Chop eggs and in a bowl stir together with celery, onion, mayonnaise, mustard, and salt and pepper to taste.
5. Spread egg salad on 4 bread slices.
6. Top each sandwich with 4 beans and remaining bread slices.
Makes 4 sandwiches
